name: Inntopia Resort Commerce API
what_it_does: Inntopia REST API for resort commerce and vacation package platform. Enables AI agents to manage lodging and activity availability, package multi-component resort vacations (lodging + lift tickets + rentals), process reservations, handle dynamic packaging logic, access guest and booking data, manage inventory across resort properties, and integrate resort data with marketing and loyalty systems.
use_cases: Retrieving lodging and activity availability for resort package creation agents
Processing vacation package bookings with multi-component bundles from reservation agents
Accessing guest profiles and stay history from resort CRM agents
Managing inventory across resort properties from channel management agents
not_for: Urban hotels without resort and outdoor recreation packaging
Single-product bookings without multi-component vacation packaging
Non-resort travel without ski, mountain, or outdoor recreation focus
best_when: A ski resort, mountain resort, or outdoor recreation property wants AI agents to automate vacation package creation, availability management, and booking workflows for multi-component guest experiences.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Dynamic packaging errors can result in incorrect pricing or availability. Package bundle logic is complex — validate all components before confirming reservations.

auth.notes: Inntopia uses API key and OAuth 2.0. Resort-level credentials. Partner program for OTA and technology integrations. Inntopia Commerce is the commerce platform; Inntopia Marketing Cloud has separate APIs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — resort commerce enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-property enterprise pricing; transaction fees on bookings
pricing.notes: Stowe, Vermont company. Founded 1998. Ski and mountain resort focus. Strong in North American ski industry. Products span resort commerce, CRM, and marketing cloud.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Multi-component package pricing errors can result in incorrect booking prices
No public MCP server — REST API with API key or OAuth2
No webhooks — requires polling for reservation status updates
Dynamic packaging logic is complex — bundle component validation required
US-focused ski and resort market — limited international resort support
Commerce vs Marketing Cloud are separate products with different APIs
agent_readiness.security_notes: Resort guest and booking data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. Ski/mountain resort niche market.

security_score_components.security_notes: Resort guest and booking data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US data residency.
